events.event_description: Craig Roberts Stapleton presented credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary (nonresident, based in Paris), establishing nonresident envoy-level relations with Monaco.

evidence.quote: Craig Roberts Stapleton, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 2006-11-22. Credentials presented: 2006-12-13. Left Paris 2009-01-29.

events.event_description: Jane Dorothy Hartley presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary (nonresident, based in Paris), elevating U.S. representation in Monaco from Envoy Nonresident to Ambassador Nonresident.

evidence.quote: Jane Dorothy Hartley, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 2014-09-26. Credentials presented: 2014-11-05. Left Paris on 2017-01-19.
